chunks.title: Praise for God's Works
chunks.reason: Introduction and declaration of the greatness and majesty of Yahweh's works.

chunks.title: Catalog of God's Deeds
chunks.reason: A detailed listing of specific acts of redemption, covenant faithfulness, and provision.

chunks.title: The Fear of the Lord
chunks.reason: A concluding wisdom statement defining the beginning of wisdom and its enduring nature.
